svg.title: RAG-based PDF Question Answering Pipeline
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the two phases of a RAG system: Indexing (PDF → Chunks → Embeddings → Vector Store) and Querying (Question → Embed → Similarity Search → LLM → Answer)
svg.text: Phase 2 — Querying (done every time user asks)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the PDF loading step in RAG')
sendPrompt('What is text chunking in RAG and why do we do it?')
sendPrompt('What are embeddings in RAG and how are they created?')
sendPrompt('What is a vector store in RAG and which libraries are used?')
sendPrompt('How is the user question processed in RAG?')
sendPrompt('Why do we embed the query with the same model used for indexing?')
sendPrompt('What is cosine similarity and how does it find relevant chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM use the retrieved chunks to answer questions?')
sendPrompt('What does the final answer from a RAG system look like?')
